for chap 6 boss try not to use retal teams since the boss mechanic does damage you through stuff that doesn't proc retal (though the boss itself does hit you)

Ramp up a lot early on. Use Murphy card to regen a charge first time, then use it to lower tentacle damage on boss until you have enough scaling to combo it to its hp threshold. It'll not attack when it reaches those hp thresholds. Then you just try to keep surviving and damaging it until Tulu card comes in to help

Tulu E1 is a big power spike, but if you are really wanting to save the prototype visions, you can hold off until starting chapter 7 where AOE damage is highly recommended at this point. Full Aqueor has its own benefits if you focus on mastery realm and tentacles cause of doubling its effects (gaining more tentacles from exalt). At that point, you pick GDoll if you like her/need the overall better support as well as Chaos-Aqueor team synergy.

That's part of their specialty now

Not the other realms
When chaos is mixed the pure talent effect of the other realm is always triggered

Faros is just a command attack
It doesn't make a separate tentacle for Tulu to trigger
Just the other card she has that creates one temporarily

oh that reminds me

temporary tentacles in red stance
thos leaves plus a permanent one aswell no?
No
temporary tentacles are always deleted after the turn no matter what you do
yeah
And they don't count as an extra tentacle either to enter red stance if you only have one permanent
ok so it works like that
Red stance always deletes a permanent tentacle

Which is why it's also a good idea to spam red tentacle stance when you are at or near full. Generating a permanent one over limit just makes it attack. Similar to how Faros E2 makes a tentacle attack

247 Realm mastery and just clicking on tentacles<:wish:1236951537788649492>
~13% of max health

1 core + 3 'supports' is the most common team composition, the core is the character that provides the 'win condition' for the team (using hibernate 8 times is not a win condition), supports are characters that help the core or the general team in some way, it could be a specific interaction like tulu increasing strength and tentacle damage for aurita's forced tentacle attacks or just something simple like murphy helping your team live longer or gdoll giving everybody aliemus and strong attack
Basically that. A win condition
